name: typescript-patterns
description: TypeScript advanced patterns, utility types, generics, type guards, and best practices

entries.title: Essential Utility Types
entries.content: Built-in utility types: Partial<T> (all optional), Required<T> (all required), Readonly<T>, Pick<T,K> (subset), Omit<T,K> (exclude keys), Record<K,V> (key-value map), Extract<T,U>, Exclude<T,U>, NonNullable<T>, ReturnType<F>, Parameters<F>, Awaited<T> (unwrap Promise).

entries.title: Type Guards & Narrowing
entries.content: Narrow types with: typeof (primitives), instanceof (classes), 'in' operator (property check), discriminated unions (literal field), custom type guards (is keyword).

entries.title: Advanced Generic Patterns
entries.content: Generic constraints (extends), conditional types (T extends U ? X : Y), mapped types, template literal types, infer keyword for extraction.

entries.title: Type-Safe Error Handling
entries.content: Use Result type instead of throwing. Custom error classes with type discrimination. Wrap async operations. Never catch and ignore errors silently.

entries.title: Runtime Validation with Zod
entries.content: Use Zod for runtime type validation. Define schemas, parse inputs, infer TypeScript types. Works for API inputs, form data, env vars, config files.
